sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94216" key="sindarwneu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σινδαρωνεύομαι</orth>, perh. corrupt for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σιναμωρέω</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">App.Prov.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.71</biblScope> </bibl> (cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope> </bibl>).</entryFree>
